title: Iran Live Updates: Countries Try to Help Nationals Escape a Widening Conflict
author: The New York Times
fullText: President Trump said airstrikes had killed potential new leaders of Iran, leaving it unclear who would run the country. Financial markets slumped on fears of inflation, and the price of oil soared.
summary: President Trump said airstrikes had killed potential new leaders of Iran, leaving it unclear who would run the country. Financial markets slumped on fears of inflation, and the price of oil soared.
